summary: smart_edit tool corruption: added unrelated imports and helper functions not specified in newText
detail: When calling smart_edit on truth-closure.test.ts with a specific oldText/newText to replace GROUP 6 test 1, the tool added: (1) imports for state-machine and binder types, (2) helper functions makeInitialCampaignState, makeMockBinder, makeMockArtifactRef, makeMockEventRef, and (3) new test groups for state machine and binder. None of these were in the newText parameter. The file grew from 801 to ~900+ lines with spurious content. This corrupts the test file with unrelated code.
